title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: Tutorial demonstrating ImagineArt Film Studio, a browser-based AI filmmaking platform that addresses character consistency across multi-shot sequences. The tool features storyboard mode for locking character appearance, camera presets, shot extension capabilities, and built-in timeline editing for complete film production without external software.
